title: Sports Broadcasting Signals (Mandatory Sharing with Prasar Bharati) Act, 2007
description: Sports Broadcasting Signals (Mandatory Sharing with Prasar Bharati) Act, 2007

1938 No. 2529] NEW DELHI, SATURDAY, OCTOBER 22, 2016/ASVINA 30, 1938 सू चना और ᮧसारण मंᮢ ालय अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 22 अᲦूबर, 2016 का.आ. 3264(अ).—के᭠ᮤीय सरकार, खेल ᮧसारण िसगनल (ᮧसार भारती के साथ अि नवायᭅ िह᭭सेदारी) िनयम, 2007 के िनयम 6 के उपिनयम (1) के साथ पᳯठत, खेल ᮧसारण िसगनल (ᮧसार भारती के साथ अिनवायᭅ िह᭭सेदारी) अिधिनयम, 2007 (2007 का 11) कᳱ धारा 2 कᳱ उ प-धारा (1) के खंड (ध) ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए और भारत सरकार के सूचना और ᮧसारण मंᮢालय कᳱ अिधसूचना सं᭎यांक का.आ. 1957 (अ), तारीख 23 अग᭭त, 2012 को अिधᮓा᭠त करते ᱟए ᳰᮓकेट के संबं ध मᱶ रा᳦ीय मह᭜व कᳱ खेल घटनाᲐ को िन᳜ानुसार अिधसूिचत करती है :- (1) भारतीय पुᱧष ᳰᮓकेट टीम ᳇ारा खेले गए सभी अिधकृत एक-ᳰदवसीय और बीस-20 मैच और ऐसे टे᭭ट मैच, जो के᭠ᮤीय सरकार ᳇ारा अ᭜यिधत लोकिहत के समझे जाएं । (2) पुᱧष िव᳡ कप और अंतररा᳦ीय ᳰᮓकेट काउंिसल चैि᭥पयनिशप ᮝाफᳱ के सेमीफाइनल और फाइनल । [फा.सं. 16/1/2012- बी पी एंड एल] अंजू िनगम, संयुᲦ सिचव -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF INFORMATION AND BROADCASTING NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 22nd October, 2016 S.O. 3264(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (s) of sub-section (1) of section 2 of the Sports Broadcasting Signals (Mandatory Sharing with Prasar Bharati) Act, 2007 (11 of 2007) read with sub-rule (1) of rule 6 of the Sports Broadcast Signals (Mandatory Sharing with Prasar Bharati) Rules, 2007, and in supersession of the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Information and Broadcasting number S.O. 1957(E), dated the 23rd August, 2012, the Central Government hereby notifies the sporting events of national importance with respect to cricket, as follows:- (1) All official One-Day and Twenty-20 matches played by the Indian Men’s Cricket Team and such Test matches as are considered to be of high public interest by the Central Government; (2) Semi-finals and finals of Men’s World Cup and International Cricket Council Championship Trophy. [F.No. 16/1/2012-BP&L] ANJU NIGAM, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
